title: Tactile Stress Relief for Sensory Overload: Hold-Based Calm on iPhone and iPad
excerpt: When words are not enough, your hands can lead the way. How hold-based Stress Relief buttons and interactive scenes help with autism-friendly sensory regulation and anxiety calm.

title: Stress Free Flow 2.1.14 Is Live: New Menu, New Sounds, Same One-Time Price
excerpt: Version 2.1.14 went live Friday, July 10, 2026 — with a redesigned menu and new background sounds including Green Noise, Grey Noise, Violet Noise, Blue Noise, and Pink–Brown Mix.

title: Green Noise, Grey Noise, and Violet Noise: Which Background Sounds Help Focus and Sleep?
excerpt: White noise is just the start. A practical guide to colored noise, nature sounds, and Lock Screen playback for ADHD focus, anxiety calm, and better sleep.

title: Breath Reset vs. Meditation Apps: Why Short Guided Breathing Works Better for Anxiety
excerpt: When you do not have twenty minutes and a quiet room, structured guided breathing beats a meditation library. How timed Breath Reset sessions fit real stress.

title: 7 Calm-Down Strategies for ADHD That Actually Feel Good
excerpt: When your brain will not slow down, you need more than "just breathe." Here are tactile, sensory-friendly ways to reset — including how a calm app can help without adding more noise.

title: How Sleep Sounds and Sensory Calm Help You Wind Down at Night
excerpt: A gentler bedtime routine for people who struggle with racing thoughts, sensory overload, or anxiety at night — plus why background sleep sounds can change everything.

title: Stress Relief Without Another Subscription: What to Look For in a Calm App
excerpt: Tired of monthly wellness fees? Here is how to find a stress relief app that respects your privacy, your senses, and your wallet.
